parsed.production_notes: The video features a real human actor applying makeup in a natural, continuous take. The AI voice is an app feature being demonstrated, not a synthetic video generation.

characters.appearance: Young woman, slim build, fair complexion, blonde hair tied back. She has distinct winged eyeliner.
characters.wardrobe: Pink zip-up hoodie over a dark t-shirt.
characters.demeanor: Casual, focused on makeup, slightly hesitant when speaking Korean.

characters.appearance: Animated female character with red hair and green eyes.
characters.wardrobe: Not fully visible, appears to be wearing a light-colored top.

scenes.setting: A dimly lit room with blue ambient lighting. A round vanity mirror is on the left, and a smartphone is lying flat on the desk in the foreground.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A is seated at a desk, looking into a round vanity mirror on the left side of the frame. She is applying makeup, first using a pink sponge on her face, then switching to a white eyeliner pencil. A smartphone lies flat on the desk in the lower right foreground, displaying an animated character. The room is illuminated with a cool blue light.

scenes.visual_description: Character A is applying makeup while interacting with a language learning app on her phone. The app's AI avatar is visible on the phone screen. Text overlays show the Korean dialogue, romanization, and English translation. Red 'X' and green checkmark icons appear to indicate incorrect and correct pronunciation.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: 한국어 싫어. [I hate Korean.]
Character B says: 이름이 뭐예요? [What's your name?]
Character A says: 제 이름은 Nesly예요. [My name is Nesly.]
Character B says: 잘 지내요? [How are you?]
Character A says: 잘 지내요? [How are you?]
Character B says: 한국어 할 수 있어요? [Do you speak Korean?]
Character A says: 네, 저는... [Yes, I...]
Character B says: 네, 할 수 있어요. [Yes, I speak it.]
Character A says: 네, 할 수 있어요. [Yes, I speak it.]
Character B says: 몇 살이에요? [How old are you?]
Character A says: 저는... 스물넷...? [I... twenty-four...?]
Character B says: 저는 스물네 살이에요. [I am 24.]
Character A says: 저는 스물네 살이에요. [I am 24.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
한국어 싫어.
Han-gug-eo sil-eo.
I hate Korean.
이름이 뭐예요?
I-reum-i mwo-ye-yo?
What's your name?
제 이름은 Nesly예요.
Je i-reum-eun Nesly ye-yo.
My name is Nesly.
잘 지내요?
Jal ji-nae-yo?
How are you?
한국어 할 수 있어요?
Han-gug-eo hal su i-sseo-yo?
Do you speak Korean?
네, 저는...
Ne, jeo-neun...
Yes, I...
네, 할 수 있어요.
Ne, hal su i-sseo-yo.
Yes, I speak it.
몇 살이에요?
Jeo-neun... seu-mul-net...?
I... twenty-four...?
저는 스물네 살이에요.
Jeo-neun seu-mul-ne sal-i-e-yo.
I am 24.

scenes.setting: Same dimly lit room with blue ambient lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A stops applying makeup and looks directly at the camera. She holds the white eyeliner pencil in her hands. The vanity mirror and smartphone are still visible in the frame.

scenes.visual_description: Character A addresses the camera directly, asking a question in English. The AI voice responds with a recommendation. Text overlays display the English dialogue.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: How can I practice my Korean every day?
Character B says: Just download Praktika.
Character A says: I'll download Praktika right now.
scenes.on_screen_text:
How can I practice my Korean every day?
Just download Praktika.
I'll download Praktika right now.

scenes.visual_description: A white screen displays the Praktika app logo and name, along with badges for the Google Play Store and Apple App Store.
scenes.on_screen_text:
praktika.ai
GET IT ON Google Play
Available on the App Store
